item.title: The Ultimate Guide to Choosing Your Perfect Diamond Necklace
item.dc:creator: Mr. Mackay
item.content:encoded:
[vc_row][vc_column][woodmart_text_block woodmart_css_id="6a2801805b62b" woodmart_inline="no" title_decoration_box_shadow="eyJkZXZpY2VzIjp7ImRlc2t0b3AiOnsiaG9yaXpvbnRhbCI6IjAiLCJ2ZXJ0aWNhbCI6IjAiLCJibHVyIjoiMCIsInNwcmVhZCI6IjAiLCJjb2xvciI6IiJ9fX0=" responsive_spacing="eyJwYXJhbV90eXBlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfcmVzcG9uc2l2ZV9zcGFjaW5nIiwic2VsZWN0b3JfaWQiOiI2YTI4MDE4MDViNjJiIiwic2hvcnRjb2RlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfdGV4dF9ibG9jayIsImRhdGEiOnsidGFibGV0Ijp7Im1hcmdpbi1ib3R0b20iOiI0MCJ9LCJtb2JpbGUiOnt9fX0=" parallax_scroll="no" wd_hide_on_desktop="no" wd_hide_on_tablet="no" wd_hide_on_mobile="no" css=".vc_custom_1781006740038{margin-bottom: 60px !important;}"]Chain length is another detail worth getting right. A 16-inch chain sits at the collarbone and is ideal for pendants you want to wear close to the neckline. An 18-inch chain falls just below the collarbone — the most universally flattering length for everyday wear. A 20-inch chain rests at the top of the chest and works well for larger, bolder pendants. Tennis necklaces are most commonly worn at 16 or 17 inches for a snug, classic fit. If you are unsure, 18 inches is almost always the right choice.[/woodmart_text_block][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row content_placement="bottom" css=".vc_custom_1781008093388{margin-bottom: 30px woodmart_css_id="6a28027dce84c" woodmart_inline="no" title_decoration_box_shadow="eyJkZXZpY2VzIjp7ImRlc2t0b3AiOnsiaG9yaXpvbnRhbCI6IjAiLCJ2ZXJ0aWNhbCI6IjAiLCJibHVyIjoiMCIsInNwcmVhZCI6IjAiLCJjb2xvciI6IiJ9fX0=" css=".vc_custom_1781006990540{margin-bottom: 60px !important;}" responsive_spacing="eyJwYXJhbV90eXBlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfcmVzcG9uc2l2ZV9zcGFjaW5nIiwic2VsZWN0b3JfaWQiOiI2YTI4MDI3ZGNlODRjIiwic2hvcnRjb2RlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfdGV4dF9ibG9jayIsImRhdGEiOnsidGFibGV0Ijp7Im1hcmdpbi1ib3R0b20iOiI0MCJ9LCJtb2JpbGUiOnt9fX0=" parallax_scroll="no" wd_hide_on_desktop="no" wd_hide_on_tablet="no" wd_hide_on_mobile="no"]Diamonds have been treasured for thousands of years, but the way we understand and evaluate them today is the product of a remarkably precise science. Since the mid-twentieth century, gemologists have used a standardised framework — universally known as the Four Cs — to describe the quality of any diamond. Understanding these four properties will not turn you into an expert overnight, but it will give you the vocabulary and confidence to ask the right questions, compare stones fairly, and ultimately walk away with a piece you are proud to own.[/woodmart_text_block][woodmart_title align="left" woodmart_css_id="6a28021015ffe" title="Understanding the Four Cs" after_title="The Four Cs are Cut, Colour, Clarity, and Carat weight. Each plays a distinct role in determining how a diamond looks and how much it costs." after_font_size="eyJwYXJhbV90eXBlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfcmVzcG9uc2l2ZV9zaXplIiwiY3NzX2FyZ3MiOnsiZm9udC1zaXplIjpbIiAudGl0bGUtYWZ0ZXJfdGl0bGUiXX0sInNlbGVjdG9yX2lkIjoiNmEyODAyMTAxNWZmZSIsImRhdGEiOnsiZGVza3RvcCI6IjE2cHgifX0=" css=".vc_custom_1781007015855{margin-bottom: 20px !important;}" responsive_spacing="eyJwYXJhbV90eXBlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfcmVzcG9uc2l2ZV9zcGFjaW5nIiwic2VsZWN0b3JfaWQiOiI2YTI4MDIxMDE1ZmZlIiwic2hvcnRjb2RlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfdGl0bGUiLCJkYXRhIjp7InRhYmxldCI6e30sIm1vYmlsZSI6e319fQ==" wd_hide_on_desktop="no" wd_hide_on_tablet="no" wd_hide_on_mobile="no"][woodmart_list size="medium" list_type="unordered-2" woodmart_css_id="6a2802b1e518e" list="%5B%7B%22list-content%22%3A%22Often%20considered%20the%20most%20important%20of%20the%20four%2C%20cut%20refers%20not%20to%20the%20shape%20of%20the%20diamond%20but%20to%20how%20well%20its%20facets%20interact%20with%20light.%20A%20well-cut%20stone%20will%20appear%20brilliantly%20alive%3B%20a%20poorly%20cut%20one%20will%20look%20dull%20regardless%20of%20its%20other%20qualities.%20Cut%20grades%20typically%20run%20from%20Excellent%20down%20to%20Poor.%22%2C%22item_type%22%3A%22inherit%22%7D%2C%7B%22list-content%22%3A%22Diamond%20colour%20is%20graded%20on%20a%20scale%20from%20D%20(completely%20colourless)%20to%20Z%20(noticeably%20yellow%20or%20brown).%20For%20most%20necklace%20settings%20in%20white%20gold%20or%20platinum%2C%20diamonds%20in%20the%20D%E2%80%93G%20range%20appear%20beautifully%20white%20to%20the%20naked%20eye.%20In%20yellow%20gold%20settings%2C%20slightly%20warmer%20stones%20in%20the%20H%E2%80%93J%20range%20can%20look%20equally%20stunning%20at%20a%20more%20accessible%20price%20point.%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%22%2C%22item_type%22%3A%22inherit%22%7D%2C%7B%22list-content%22%3A%22Clarity%20measures%20the%20presence%20of%20internal%20inclusions%20or%20external%20blemishes.%20The%20scale%20runs%20from%20Flawless%20(FL)%20to%20Included%20(I3).%20For%20a%20pendant%20worn%20at%20the%20chest%2C%20a%20stone%20graded%20VS2%20or%20SI1%20will%20almost%20certainly%20appear%20eye-clean%20%E2%80%94%20meaning%20no%20imperfections%20are%20visible%20without%20magnification%20%E2%80%94%20making%20it%20an%20excellent%20value%20choice.%22%2C%22item_type%22%3A%22inherit%22%7D%2C%7B%22list-content%22%3A%22Carat%20is%20simply%20a%20measure%20of%20weight%20(one%20carat%20equals%200.2%20grams).%20Larger%20stones%20are%20rarer%20and%20therefore%20more%20expensive%20per%20carat%2C%20but%20carat%20weight%20alone%20does%20not%20determine%20beauty.%20A%20smaller%2C%20well-cut%20diamond%20will%20consistently%20outshine%20a%20larger%2C%20poorly%20cut%20one.%22%2C%22item_type%22%3A%22inherit%22%7D%5D" css=".vc_custom_1781007093571{margin-bottom: 60px !important;}" responsive_spacing="eyJwYXJhbV90eXBlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfcmVzcG9uc2l2ZV9zcGFjaW5nIiwic2VsZWN0b3JfaWQiOiI2YTI4MDJiMWU1MThlIiwic2hvcnRjb2RlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfbGlzdCIsImRhdGEiOnsidGFibGV0Ijp7Im1hcmdpbi1ib3R0b20iOiI0MCJ9LCJtb2JpbGUiOnt9fX0="][woodmart_image rounding_size="" woodmart_css_id="6a2801c865475" img_id="416" img_size="full" parallax_scroll="no" css=".vc_custom_1781007118104{margin-bottom: 60px !important;}" responsive_spacing="eyJwYXJhbV90eXBlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfcmVzcG9uc2l2ZV9zcGFjaW5nIiwic2VsZWN0b3JfaWQiOiI2YTI4MDFjODY1NDc1Iiwic2hvcnRjb2RlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfaW1hZ2UiLCJkYXRhIjp7InRhYmxldCI6eyJtYXJnaW4tYm90dG9tIjoiNDAifSwibW9iaWxlIjp7fX19" woodmart_box_shadow="no" wd_hide_on_desktop="no" wd_hide_on_tablet="no" wd_hide_on_mobile="no" display_inline="no"][woodmart_text_block woodmart_css_id="6a28027e07fd9" woodmart_inline="no" title_decoration_box_shadow="eyJkZXZpY2VzIjp7ImRlc2t0b3AiOnsiaG9yaXpvbnRhbCI6IjAiLCJ2ZXJ0aWNhbCI6IjAiLCJibHVyIjoiMCIsInNwcmVhZCI6IjAiLCJjb2xvciI6IiJ9fX0=" css=".vc_custom_1781007141174{margin-bottom: 60px !important;}" responsive_spacing="eyJwYXJhbV90eXBlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfcmVzcG9uc2l2ZV9zcGFjaW5nIiwic2VsZWN0b3JfaWQiOiI2YTI4MDI3ZTA3ZmQ5Iiwic2hvcnRjb2RlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfdGV4dF9ibG9jayIsImRhdGEiOnsidGFibGV0Ijp7Im1hcmdpbi1ib3R0b20iOiI0MCJ9LCJtb2JpbGUiOnt9fX0=" parallax_scroll="no" wd_hide_on_desktop="no" wd_hide_on_tablet="no" wd_hide_on_mobile="no"]Once you have a handle on the Four Cs, the next question is style. Diamond necklaces span an enormous range of designs, and understanding the most popular silhouettes will help you match the piece to its intended purpose — and to the person who will wear it.

A solitaire pendant is the most enduringly popular choice. A single diamond — round brilliant, oval, or pear-shaped — suspended from a fine chain is effortlessly versatile. It works with a casual weekend outfit and a black-tie gown in equal measure, which makes it an ideal everyday piece and a safe choice when you are buying for someone else. A halo pendant adds a ring of smaller diamonds around a central stone, dramatically amplifying the perceived size and sparkle for its price. For those who want something truly lavish, a tennis necklace — a continuous line of identically matched diamonds encircling the neck — is the pinnacle of diamond jewellery. It is a piece that genuinely needs no other jewellery to complete a look.[/woodmart_text_block][woodmart_title title_width="custom" woodmart_css_id="6a2803801d5f4" title_desktop_width="eyJwYXJhbV90eXBlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfc2xpZGVyIiwiY3NzX2FyZ3MiOnsiLS13ZC1tYXgtd2lkdGgiOlsiIl19LCJjc3NfcGFyYW1zIjp7ImRldmljZSI6ImRlc2t0b3AifSwic2VsZWN0b3JfaWQiOiI2YTI4MDM4MDFkNWY0IiwiZGF0YSI6eyJkZXNrdG9wIjo1NzB9fQ==" title="Thank you for taking the time to read this post. Stay tuned for more updates!" responsive_spacing="eyJwYXJhbV90eXBlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfcmVzcG9uc2l2ZV9zcGFjaW5nIiwic2VsZWN0b3JfaWQiOiI2YTI4MDM4MDFkNWY0Iiwic2hvcnRjb2RlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfdGl0bGUiLCJkYXRhIjp7InRhYmxldCI6e30sIm1vYmlsZSI6e319fQ==" wd_hide_on_desktop="no" wd_hide_on_tablet="no" wd_hide_on_mobile="no" css=".vc_custom_1781007235835{margin-bottom: 20px !important;}"][woodmart_image img_align="center" rounding_size="" woodmart_css_id="6a2801c865475" img_id="417" img_size="335x71" parallax_scroll="no" css=".vc_custom_1781007230581{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}" responsive_spacing="eyJwYXJhbV90eXBlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfcmVzcG9uc2l2ZV9zcGFjaW5nIiwic2VsZWN0b3JfaWQiOiI2YTI4MDFjODY1NDc1Iiwic2hvcnRjb2RlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfaW1hZ2UiLCJkYXRhIjp7InRhYmxldCI6e30sIm1vYmlsZSI6e319fQ==" woodmart_box_shadow="no" wd_hide_on_desktop="no" wd_hide_on_tablet="no" wd_hide_on_mobile="no" display_inline="no"][/vc_column][/vc_row]

item.title: Meet the Artisans Who Bring Our Jewellery to Life
item.dc:creator: Mr. Mackay
item.content:encoded:
[vc_row][vc_column][woodmart_text_block woodmart_css_id="6a2801805b62b" woodmart_inline="no" title_decoration_box_shadow="eyJkZXZpY2VzIjp7ImRlc2t0b3AiOnsiaG9yaXpvbnRhbCI6IjAiLCJ2ZXJ0aWNhbCI6IjAiLCJibHVyIjoiMCIsInNwcmVhZCI6IjAiLCJjb2xvciI6IiJ9fX0=" responsive_spacing="eyJwYXJhbV90eXBlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfcmVzcG9uc2l2ZV9zcGFjaW5nIiwic2VsZWN0b3JfaWQiOiI2YTI4MDE4MDViNjJiIiwic2hvcnRjb2RlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfdGV4dF9ibG9jayIsImRhdGEiOnsidGFibGV0Ijp7Im1hcmdpbi1ib3R0b20iOiI0MCJ9LCJtb2JpbGUiOnt9fX0=" parallax_scroll="no" wd_hide_on_desktop="no" wd_hide_on_tablet="no" wd_hide_on_mobile="no" css=".vc_custom_1781006740038{margin-bottom: 60px !important;}"]Chain length is another detail worth getting right. A 16-inch chain sits at the collarbone and is ideal for pendants you want to wear close to the neckline. An 18-inch chain falls just below the collarbone — the most universally flattering length for everyday wear. A 20-inch chain rests at the top of the chest and works well for larger, bolder pendants. Tennis necklaces are most commonly worn at 16 or 17 inches for a snug, classic fit. If you are unsure, 18 inches is almost always the right choice.[/woodmart_text_block][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row content_placement="bottom" css=".vc_custom_1781008093388{margin-bottom: 30px 60px !important;}" responsive_spacing="eyJwYXJhbV90eXBlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfcmVzcG9uc2l2ZV9zcGFjaW5nIiwic2VsZWN0b3JfaWQiOiI2YTI4MDI3ZGNlODRjIiwic2hvcnRjb2RlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfdGV4dF9ibG9jayIsImRhdGEiOnsidGFibGV0Ijp7Im1hcmdpbi1ib3R0b20iOiI0MCJ9LCJtb2JpbGUiOnt9fX0=" parallax_scroll="no" wd_hide_on_desktop="no" wd_hide_on_tablet="no" wd_hide_on_mobile="no"]Diamonds have been treasured for thousands of years, but the way we understand and evaluate them today is the product of a remarkably precise science. Since the mid-twentieth century, gemologists have used a standardised framework — universally known as the Four Cs — to describe the quality of any diamond. Understanding these four properties will not turn you into an expert overnight, but it will give you the vocabulary and confidence to ask the right questions, compare stones fairly, and ultimately walk away with a piece you are proud to own.[/woodmart_text_block][woodmart_title align="left" woodmart_css_id="6a28021015ffe" title="Understanding the Four Cs" after_title="The Four Cs are Cut, Colour, Clarity, and Carat weight. Each plays a distinct role in determining how a diamond looks and how much it costs." after_font_size="eyJwYXJhbV90eXBlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfcmVzcG9uc2l2ZV9zaXplIiwiY3NzX2FyZ3MiOnsiZm9udC1zaXplIjpbIiAudGl0bGUtYWZ0ZXJfdGl0bGUiXX0sInNlbGVjdG9yX2lkIjoiNmEyODAyMTAxNWZmZSIsImRhdGEiOnsiZGVza3RvcCI6IjE2cHgifX0=" css=".vc_custom_1781007015855{margin-bottom: 20px !important;}" responsive_spacing="eyJwYXJhbV90eXBlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfcmVzcG9uc2l2ZV9zcGFjaW5nIiwic2VsZWN0b3JfaWQiOiI2YTI4MDIxMDE1ZmZlIiwic2hvcnRjb2RlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfdGl0bGUiLCJkYXRhIjp7InRhYmxldCI6e30sIm1vYmlsZSI6e319fQ==" wd_hide_on_desktop="no" wd_hide_on_tablet="no" wd_hide_on_mobile="no"][woodmart_list size="medium" list_type="unordered-2" woodmart_css_id="6a2802b1e518e" list="%5B%7B%22list-content%22%3A%22Often%20considered%20the%20most%20important%20of%20the%20four%2C%20cut%20refers%20not%20to%20the%20shape%20of%20the%20diamond%20but%20to%20how%20well%20its%20facets%20interact%20with%20light.%20A%20well-cut%20stone%20will%20appear%20brilliantly%20alive%3B%20a%20poorly%20cut%20one%20will%20look%20dull%20regardless%20of%20its%20other%20qualities.%20Cut%20grades%20typically%20run%20from%20Excellent%20down%20to%20Poor.%22%2C%22item_type%22%3A%22inherit%22%7D%2C%7B%22list-content%22%3A%22Diamond%20colour%20is%20graded%20on%20a%20scale%20from%20D%20(completely%20colourless)%20to%20Z%20(noticeably%20yellow%20or%20brown).%20For%20most%20necklace%20settings%20in%20white%20gold%20or%20platinum%2C%20diamonds%20in%20the%20D%E2%80%93G%20range%20appear%20beautifully%20white%20to%20the%20naked%20eye.%20In%20yellow%20gold%20settings%2C%20slightly%20warmer%20stones%20in%20the%20H%E2%80%93J%20range%20can%20look%20equally%20stunning%20at%20a%20more%20accessible%20price%20point.%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%22%2C%22item_type%22%3A%22inherit%22%7D%2C%7B%22list-content%22%3A%22Clarity%20measures%20the%20presence%20of%20internal%20inclusions%20or%20external%20blemishes.%20The%20scale%20runs%20from%20Flawless%20(FL)%20to%20Included%20(I3).%20For%20a%20pendant%20worn%20at%20the%20chest%2C%20a%20stone%20graded%20VS2%20or%20SI1%20will%20almost%20certainly%20appear%20eye-clean%20%E2%80%94%20meaning%20no%20imperfections%20are%20visible%20without%20magnification%20%E2%80%94%20making%20it%20an%20excellent%20value%20choice.%22%2C%22item_type%22%3A%22inherit%22%7D%2C%7B%22list-content%22%3A%22Carat%20is%20simply%20a%20measure%20of%20weight%20(one%20carat%20equals%200.2%20grams).%20Larger%20stones%20are%20rarer%20and%20therefore%20more%20expensive%20per%20carat%2C%20but%20carat%20weight%20alone%20does%20not%20determine%20beauty.%20A%20smaller%2C%20well-cut%20diamond%20will%20consistently%20outshine%20a%20larger%2C%20poorly%20cut%20one.%22%2C%22item_type%22%3A%22inherit%22%7D%5D" css=".vc_custom_1781007093571{margin-bottom: 60px !important;}" responsive_spacing="eyJwYXJhbV90eXBlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfcmVzcG9uc2l2ZV9zcGFjaW5nIiwic2VsZWN0b3JfaWQiOiI2YTI4MDJiMWU1MThlIiwic2hvcnRjb2RlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfbGlzdCIsImRhdGEiOnsidGFibGV0Ijp7Im1hcmdpbi1ib3R0b20iOiI0MCJ9LCJtb2JpbGUiOnt9fX0="][woodmart_image rounding_size="" woodmart_css_id="6a2801c865475" img_id="416" img_size="full" parallax_scroll="no" css=".vc_custom_1781007118104{margin-bottom: 60px !important;}" responsive_spacing="eyJwYXJhbV90eXBlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfcmVzcG9uc2l2ZV9zcGFjaW5nIiwic2VsZWN0b3JfaWQiOiI2YTI4MDFjODY1NDc1Iiwic2hvcnRjb2RlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfaW1hZ2UiLCJkYXRhIjp7InRhYmxldCI6eyJtYXJnaW4tYm90dG9tIjoiNDAifSwibW9iaWxlIjp7fX19" woodmart_box_shadow="no" wd_hide_on_desktop="no" wd_hide_on_tablet="no" wd_hide_on_mobile="no" display_inline="no"][woodmart_text_block woodmart_css_id="6a28027e07fd9" woodmart_inline="no" title_decoration_box_shadow="eyJkZXZpY2VzIjp7ImRlc2t0b3AiOnsiaG9yaXpvbnRhbCI6IjAiLCJ2ZXJ0aWNhbCI6IjAiLCJibHVyIjoiMCIsInNwcmVhZCI6IjAiLCJjb2xvciI6IiJ9fX0=" css=".vc_custom_1781007141174{margin-bottom: 60px !important;}" responsive_spacing="eyJwYXJhbV90eXBlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfcmVzcG9uc2l2ZV9zcGFjaW5nIiwic2VsZWN0b3JfaWQiOiI2YTI4MDI3ZTA3ZmQ5Iiwic2hvcnRjb2RlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfdGV4dF9ibG9jayIsImRhdGEiOnsidGFibGV0Ijp7Im1hcmdpbi1ib3R0b20iOiI0MCJ9LCJtb2JpbGUiOnt9fX0=" parallax_scroll="no" wd_hide_on_desktop="no" wd_hide_on_tablet="no" wd_hide_on_mobile="no"]Once you have a handle on the Four Cs, the next question is style. Diamond necklaces span an enormous range of designs, and understanding the most popular silhouettes will help you match the piece to its intended purpose — and to the person who will wear it.

A solitaire pendant is the most enduringly popular choice. A single diamond — round brilliant, oval, or pear-shaped — suspended from a fine chain is effortlessly versatile. It works with a casual weekend outfit and a black-tie gown in equal measure, which makes it an ideal everyday piece and a safe choice when you are buying for someone else. A halo pendant adds a ring of smaller diamonds around a central stone, dramatically amplifying the perceived size and sparkle for its price. For those who want something truly lavish, a tennis necklace — a continuous line of identically matched diamonds encircling the neck — is the pinnacle of diamond jewellery. It is a piece that genuinely needs no other jewellery to complete a look.[/woodmart_text_block][woodmart_title title_width="custom" woodmart_css_id="6a2803801d5f4" title_desktop_width="eyJwYXJhbV90eXBlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfc2xpZGVyIiwiY3NzX2FyZ3MiOnsiLS13ZC1tYXgtd2lkdGgiOlsiIl19LCJjc3NfcGFyYW1zIjp7ImRldmljZSI6ImRlc2t0b3AifSwic2VsZWN0b3JfaWQiOiI2YTI4MDM4MDFkNWY0IiwiZGF0YSI6eyJkZXNrdG9wIjo1NzB9fQ==" title="Thank you for taking the time to read this post. Stay tuned for more updates!" responsive_spacing="eyJwYXJhbV90eXBlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfcmVzcG9uc2l2ZV9zcGFjaW5nIiwic2VsZWN0b3JfaWQiOiI2YTI4MDM4MDFkNWY0Iiwic2hvcnRjb2RlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfdGl0bGUiLCJkYXRhIjp7InRhYmxldCI6e30sIm1vYmlsZSI6e319fQ==" wd_hide_on_desktop="no" wd_hide_on_tablet="no" wd_hide_on_mobile="no" css=".vc_custom_1781007235835{margin-bottom: 20px !important;}"][woodmart_image img_align="center" rounding_size="" woodmart_css_id="6a2801c865475" img_id="417" img_size="335x71" parallax_scroll="no" css=".vc_custom_1781007230581{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}" responsive_spacing="eyJwYXJhbV90eXBlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfcmVzcG9uc2l2ZV9zcGFjaW5nIiwic2VsZWN0b3JfaWQiOiI2YTI4MDFjODY1NDc1Iiwic2hvcnRjb2RlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfaW1hZ2UiLCJkYXRhIjp7InRhYmxldCI6e30sIm1vYmlsZSI6e319fQ==" woodmart_box_shadow="no" wd_hide_on_desktop="no" wd_hide_on_tablet="no" wd_hide_on_mobile="no" display_inline="no"][/vc_column][/vc_row]

parallax_scroll="no" wd_hide_on_desktop="no" wd_hide_on_tablet="no" wd_hide_on_mobile="no"]Diamonds have been treasured for thousands of years, but the way we understand and evaluate them today is the product of a remarkably precise science. Since the mid-twentieth century, gemologists have used a standardised framework — universally known as the Four Cs — to describe the quality of any diamond. Understanding these four properties will not turn you into an expert overnight, but it will give you the vocabulary and confidence to ask the right questions, compare stones fairly, and ultimately walk away with a piece you are proud to own.[/woodmart_text_block][woodmart_title align="left" woodmart_css_id="6a28021015ffe" title="Understanding the Four Cs" after_title="The Four Cs are Cut, Colour, Clarity, and Carat weight. Each plays a distinct role in determining how a diamond looks and how much it costs." after_font_size="eyJwYXJhbV90eXBlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfcmVzcG9uc2l2ZV9zaXplIiwiY3NzX2FyZ3MiOnsiZm9udC1zaXplIjpbIiAudGl0bGUtYWZ0ZXJfdGl0bGUiXX0sInNlbGVjdG9yX2lkIjoiNmEyODAyMTAxNWZmZSIsImRhdGEiOnsiZGVza3RvcCI6IjE2cHgifX0=" css=".vc_custom_1781007015855{margin-bottom: 20px !important;}" responsive_spacing="eyJwYXJhbV90eXBlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfcmVzcG9uc2l2ZV9zcGFjaW5nIiwic2VsZWN0b3JfaWQiOiI2YTI4MDIxMDE1ZmZlIiwic2hvcnRjb2RlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfdGl0bGUiLCJkYXRhIjp7InRhYmxldCI6e30sIm1vYmlsZSI6e319fQ==" wd_hide_on_desktop="no" wd_hide_on_tablet="no" wd_hide_on_mobile="no"][woodmart_list size="medium" list_type="unordered-2" woodmart_css_id="6a2802b1e518e" list="%5B%7B%22list-content%22%3A%22Often%20considered%20the%20most%20important%20of%20the%20four%2C%20cut%20refers%20not%20to%20the%20shape%20of%20the%20diamond%20but%20to%20how%20well%20its%20facets%20interact%20with%20light.%20A%20well-cut%20stone%20will%20appear%20brilliantly%20alive%3B%20a%20poorly%20cut%20one%20will%20look%20dull%20regardless%20of%20its%20other%20qualities.%20Cut%20grades%20typically%20run%20from%20Excellent%20down%20to%20Poor.%22%2C%22item_type%22%3A%22inherit%22%7D%2C%7B%22list-content%22%3A%22Diamond%20colour%20is%20graded%20on%20a%20scale%20from%20D%20(completely%20colourless)%20to%20Z%20(noticeably%20yellow%20or%20brown).%20For%20most%20necklace%20settings%20in%20white%20gold%20or%20platinum%2C%20diamonds%20in%20the%20D%E2%80%93G%20range%20appear%20beautifully%20white%20to%20the%20naked%20eye.%20In%20yellow%20gold%20settings%2C%20slightly%20warmer%20stones%20in%20the%20H%E2%80%93J%20range%20can%20look%20equally%20stunning%20at%20a%20more%20accessible%20price%20point.%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%22%2C%22item_type%22%3A%22inherit%22%7D%2C%7B%22list-content%22%3A%22Clarity%20measures%20the%20presence%20of%20internal%20inclusions%20or%20external%20blemishes.%20The%20scale%20runs%20from%20Flawless%20(FL)%20to%20Included%20(I3).%20For%20a%20pendant%20worn%20at%20the%20chest%2C%20a%20stone%20graded%20VS2%20or%20SI1%20will%20almost%20certainly%20appear%20eye-clean%20%E2%80%94%20meaning%20no%20imperfections%20are%20visible%20without%20magnification%20%E2%80%94%20making%20it%20an%20excellent%20value%20choice.%22%2C%22item_type%22%3A%22inherit%22%7D%2C%7B%22list-content%22%3A%22Carat%20is%20simply%20a%20measure%20of%20weight%20(one%20carat%20equals%200.2%20grams).%20Larger%20stones%20are%20rarer%20and%20therefore%20more%20expensive%20per%20carat%2C%20but%20carat%20weight%20alone%20does%20not%20determine%20beauty.%20A%20smaller%2C%20well-cut%20diamond%20will%20consistently%20outshine%20a%20larger%2C%20poorly%20cut%20one.%22%2C%22item_type%22%3A%22inherit%22%7D%5D" css=".vc_custom_1781007093571{margin-bottom: 60px !important;}" title_decoration_box_shadow="eyJkZXZpY2VzIjp7ImRlc2t0b3AiOnsiaG9yaXpvbnRhbCI6IjAiLCJ2ZXJ0aWNhbCI6IjAiLCJibHVyIjoiMCIsInNwcmVhZCI6IjAiLCJjb2xvciI6IiJ9fX0=" css=".vc_custom_1781007141174{margin-bottom: 60px !important;}" responsive_spacing="eyJwYXJhbV90eXBlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfcmVzcG9uc2l2ZV9zcGFjaW5nIiwic2VsZWN0b3JfaWQiOiI2YTI4MDI3ZTA3ZmQ5Iiwic2hvcnRjb2RlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfdGV4dF9ibG9jayIsImRhdGEiOnsidGFibGV0Ijp7Im1hcmdpbi1ib3R0b20iOiI0MCJ9LCJtb2JpbGUiOnt9fX0=" parallax_scroll="no" wd_hide_on_desktop="no" wd_hide_on_tablet="no" wd_hide_on_mobile="no"]Once you have a handle on the Four Cs, the next question is style. Diamond necklaces span an enormous range of designs, and understanding the most popular silhouettes will help you match the piece to its intended purpose — and to the person who will wear it.

A solitaire pendant is the most enduringly popular choice. A single diamond — round brilliant, oval, or pear-shaped — suspended from a fine chain is effortlessly versatile. It works with a casual weekend outfit and a black-tie gown in equal measure, which makes it an ideal everyday piece and a safe choice when you are buying for someone else. A halo pendant adds a ring of smaller diamonds around a central stone, dramatically amplifying the perceived size and sparkle for its price. For those who want something truly lavish, a tennis necklace — a continuous line of identically matched diamonds encircling the neck — is the pinnacle of diamond jewellery. It is a piece that genuinely needs no other jewellery to complete a look.[/woodmart_text_block][woodmart_title title_width="custom" woodmart_css_id="6a2803801d5f4" title_desktop_width="eyJwYXJhbV90eXBlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfc2xpZGVyIiwiY3NzX2FyZ3MiOnsiLS13ZC1tYXgtd2lkdGgiOlsiIl19LCJjc3NfcGFyYW1zIjp7ImRldmljZSI6ImRlc2t0b3AifSwic2VsZWN0b3JfaWQiOiI2YTI4MDM4MDFkNWY0IiwiZGF0YSI6eyJkZXNrdG9wIjo1NzB9fQ==" title="Thank you for taking the time to read this post. Stay tuned for more updates!" responsive_spacing="eyJwYXJhbV90eXBlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfcmVzcG9uc2l2ZV9zcGFjaW5nIiwic2VsZWN0b3JfaWQiOiI2YTI4MDM4MDFkNWY0Iiwic2hvcnRjb2RlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfdGl0bGUiLCJkYXRhIjp7InRhYmxldCI6e30sIm1vYmlsZSI6e319fQ==" wd_hide_on_desktop="no" wd_hide_on_tablet="no" wd_hide_on_mobile="no" css=".vc_custom_1781007235835{margin-bottom: 20px !important;}"][woodmart_image img_align="center" rounding_size="" woodmart_css_id="6a2801c865475" img_id="417" img_size="335x71" parallax_scroll="no" css=".vc_custom_1781007230581{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}" responsive_spacing="eyJwYXJhbV90eXBlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfcmVzcG9uc2l2ZV9zcGFjaW5nIiwic2VsZWN0b3JfaWQiOiI2YTI4MDFjODY1NDc1Iiwic2hvcnRjb2RlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfaW1hZ2UiLCJkYXRhIjp7InRhYmxldCI6e30sIm1vYmlsZSI6e319fQ==" woodmart_box_shadow="no" wd_hide_on_desktop="no" wd_hide_on_tablet="no" wd_hide_on_mobile="no" display_inline="no"][/vc_column][/vc_row]

item.title: Finding the Perfect Piece for Every Occasion
item.dc:creator: Mr. Mackay
item.content:encoded:
[vc_row][vc_column][woodmart_text_block woodmart_css_id="6a2801805b62b" woodmart_inline="no" title_decoration_box_shadow="eyJkZXZpY2VzIjp7ImRlc2t0b3AiOnsiaG9yaXpvbnRhbCI6IjAiLCJ2ZXJ0aWNhbCI6IjAiLCJibHVyIjoiMCIsInNwcmVhZCI6IjAiLCJjb2xvciI6IiJ9fX0=" responsive_spacing="eyJwYXJhbV90eXBlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfcmVzcG9uc2l2ZV9zcGFjaW5nIiwic2VsZWN0b3JfaWQiOiI2YTI4MDE4MDViNjJiIiwic2hvcnRjb2RlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfdGV4dF9ibG9jayIsImRhdGEiOnsidGFibGV0Ijp7Im1hcmdpbi1ib3R0b20iOiI0MCJ9LCJtb2JpbGUiOnt9fX0=" parallax_scroll="no" wd_hide_on_desktop="no" wd_hide_on_tablet="no" wd_hide_on_mobile="no" css=".vc_custom_1781006740038{margin-bottom: 60px !important;}"]Chain length is another detail worth getting right. A 16-inch chain sits at the collarbone and is ideal for pendants you want to wear close to the neckline. An 18-inch chain falls just below the collarbone — the most universally flattering length for everyday wear. A 20-inch chain rests at the top of the chest and works well for larger, bolder pendants. Tennis necklaces are most commonly worn at 16 or 17 inches for a snug, classic fit. If you are unsure, 18 inches is almost always the right choice.[/woodmart_text_block][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row content_placement="bottom" css=".vc_custom_1781008093388{margin-bottom: 30px parallax_scroll="no" wd_hide_on_desktop="no" wd_hide_on_tablet="no" wd_hide_on_mobile="no"]Diamonds have been treasured for thousands of years, but the way we understand and evaluate them today is the product of a remarkably precise science. Since the mid-twentieth century, gemologists have used a standardised framework — universally known as the Four Cs — to describe the quality of any diamond. Understanding these four properties will not turn you into an expert overnight, but it will give you the vocabulary and confidence to ask the right questions, compare stones fairly, and ultimately walk away with a piece you are proud to own.[/woodmart_text_block][woodmart_title align="left" woodmart_css_id="6a28021015ffe" title="Understanding the Four Cs" after_title="The Four Cs are Cut, Colour, Clarity, and Carat weight. Each plays a distinct role in determining how a diamond looks and how much it costs." list="%5B%7B%22list-content%22%3A%22Often%20considered%20the%20most%20important%20of%20the%20four%2C%20cut%20refers%20not%20to%20the%20shape%20of%20the%20diamond%20but%20to%20how%20well%20its%20facets%20interact%20with%20light.%20A%20well-cut%20stone%20will%20appear%20brilliantly%20alive%3B%20a%20poorly%20cut%20one%20will%20look%20dull%20regardless%20of%20its%20other%20qualities.%20Cut%20grades%20typically%20run%20from%20Excellent%20down%20to%20Poor.%22%2C%22item_type%22%3A%22inherit%22%7D%2C%7B%22list-content%22%3A%22Diamond%20colour%20is%20graded%20on%20a%20scale%20from%20D%20(completely%20colourless)%20to%20Z%20(noticeably%20yellow%20or%20brown).%20For%20most%20necklace%20settings%20in%20white%20gold%20or%20platinum%2C%20diamonds%20in%20the%20D%E2%80%93G%20range%20appear%20beautifully%20white%20to%20the%20naked%20eye.%20In%20yellow%20gold%20settings%2C%20slightly%20warmer%20stones%20in%20the%20H%E2%80%93J%20range%20can%20look%20equally%20stunning%20at%20a%20more%20accessible%20price%20point.%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%22%2C%22item_type%22%3A%22inherit%22%7D%2C%7B%22list-content%22%3A%22Clarity%20measures%20the%20presence%20of%20internal%20inclusions%20or%20external%20blemishes.%20The%20scale%20runs%20from%20Flawless%20(FL)%20to%20Included%20(I3).%20For%20a%20pendant%20worn%20at%20the%20chest%2C%20a%20stone%20graded%20VS2%20or%20SI1%20will%20almost%20certainly%20appear%20eye-clean%20%E2%80%94%20meaning%20no%20imperfections%20are%20visible%20without%20magnification%20%E2%80%94%20making%20it%20an%20excellent%20value%20choice.%22%2C%22item_type%22%3A%22inherit%22%7D%2C%7B%22list-content%22%3A%22Carat%20is%20simply%20a%20measure%20of%20weight%20(one%20carat%20equals%200.2%20grams).%20Larger%20stones%20are%20rarer%20and%20therefore%20more%20expensive%20per%20carat%2C%20but%20carat%20weight%20alone%20does%20not%20determine%20beauty.%20A%20smaller%2C%20well-cut%20diamond%20will%20consistently%20outshine%20a%20larger%2C%20poorly%20cut%20one.%22%2C%22item_type%22%3A%22inherit%22%7D%5D" css=".vc_custom_1781007093571{margin-bottom: 60px !important;}" title_decoration_box_shadow="eyJkZXZpY2VzIjp7ImRlc2t0b3AiOnsiaG9yaXpvbnRhbCI6IjAiLCJ2ZXJ0aWNhbCI6IjAiLCJibHVyIjoiMCIsInNwcmVhZCI6IjAiLCJjb2xvciI6IiJ9fX0=" css=".vc_custom_1781007141174{margin-bottom: 60px !important;}" responsive_spacing="eyJwYXJhbV90eXBlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfcmVzcG9uc2l2ZV9zcGFjaW5nIiwic2VsZWN0b3JfaWQiOiI2YTI4MDI3ZTA3ZmQ5Iiwic2hvcnRjb2RlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfdGV4dF9ibG9jayIsImRhdGEiOnsidGFibGV0Ijp7Im1hcmdpbi1ib3R0b20iOiI0MCJ9LCJtb2JpbGUiOnt9fX0=" parallax_scroll="no" wd_hide_on_desktop="no" wd_hide_on_tablet="no" wd_hide_on_mobile="no"]Once you have a handle on the Four Cs, the next question is style. Diamond necklaces span an enormous range of designs, and understanding the most popular silhouettes will help you match the piece to its intended purpose — and to the person who will wear it.

A solitaire pendant is the most enduringly popular choice. A single diamond — round brilliant, oval, or pear-shaped — suspended from a fine chain is effortlessly versatile. It works with a casual weekend outfit and a black-tie gown in equal measure, which makes it an ideal everyday piece and a safe choice when you are buying for someone else. A halo pendant adds a ring of smaller diamonds around a central stone, dramatically amplifying the perceived size and sparkle for its price. For those who want something truly lavish, a tennis necklace — a continuous line of identically matched diamonds encircling the neck — is the pinnacle of diamond jewellery. It is a piece that genuinely needs no other jewellery to complete a look.[/woodmart_text_block][woodmart_title title_width="custom" woodmart_css_id="6a2803801d5f4" title_desktop_width="eyJwYXJhbV90eXBlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfc2xpZGVyIiwiY3NzX2FyZ3MiOnsiLS13ZC1tYXgtd2lkdGgiOlsiIl19LCJjc3NfcGFyYW1zIjp7ImRldmljZSI6ImRlc2t0b3AifSwic2VsZWN0b3JfaWQiOiI2YTI4MDM4MDFkNWY0IiwiZGF0YSI6eyJkZXNrdG9wIjo1NzB9fQ==" title="Thank you for taking the time to read this post. Stay tuned for more updates!" responsive_spacing="eyJwYXJhbV90eXBlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfcmVzcG9uc2l2ZV9zcGFjaW5nIiwic2VsZWN0b3JfaWQiOiI2YTI4MDM4MDFkNWY0Iiwic2hvcnRjb2RlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfdGl0bGUiLCJkYXRhIjp7InRhYmxldCI6e30sIm1vYmlsZSI6e319fQ==" wd_hide_on_desktop="no" wd_hide_on_tablet="no" wd_hide_on_mobile="no" css=".vc_custom_1781007235835{margin-bottom: 20px !important;}"][woodmart_image img_align="center" rounding_size="" woodmart_css_id="6a2801c865475" img_id="417" img_size="335x71" parallax_scroll="no" css=".vc_custom_1781007230581{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}" responsive_spacing="eyJwYXJhbV90eXBlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfcmVzcG9uc2l2ZV9zcGFjaW5nIiwic2VsZWN0b3JfaWQiOiI2YTI4MDFjODY1NDc1Iiwic2hvcnRjb2RlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfaW1hZ2UiLCJkYXRhIjp7InRhYmxldCI6e30sIm1vYmlsZSI6e319fQ==" woodmart_box_shadow="no" wd_hide_on_desktop="no" wd_hide_on_tablet="no" wd_hide_on_mobile="no" display_inline="no"][/vc_column][/vc_row]

item.title: Styling Simple Jewellery for Maximum Impact
item.dc:creator: Mr. Mackay
item.content:encoded:
[vc_row][vc_column][woodmart_text_block woodmart_css_id="6a2801805b62b" woodmart_inline="no" title_decoration_box_shadow="eyJkZXZpY2VzIjp7ImRlc2t0b3AiOnsiaG9yaXpvbnRhbCI6IjAiLCJ2ZXJ0aWNhbCI6IjAiLCJibHVyIjoiMCIsInNwcmVhZCI6IjAiLCJjb2xvciI6IiJ9fX0=" responsive_spacing="eyJwYXJhbV90eXBlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfcmVzcG9uc2l2ZV9zcGFjaW5nIiwic2VsZWN0b3JfaWQiOiI2YTI4MDE4MDViNjJiIiwic2hvcnRjb2RlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfdGV4dF9ibG9jayIsImRhdGEiOnsidGFibGV0Ijp7Im1hcmdpbi1ib3R0b20iOiI0MCJ9LCJtb2JpbGUiOnt9fX0=" parallax_scroll="no" wd_hide_on_desktop="no" wd_hide_on_tablet="no" wd_hide_on_mobile="no" css=".vc_custom_1781006740038{margin-bottom: 60px !important;}"]Chain length is another detail worth getting right. A 16-inch chain sits at the collarbone and is ideal for pendants you want to wear close to the neckline. An 18-inch chain falls just below the collarbone — the most universally flattering length for everyday wear. A 20-inch chain rests at the top of the chest and works well for larger, bolder pendants. Tennis necklaces are most commonly worn at 16 or 17 inches for a snug, classic fit. If you are unsure, 18 inches is almost always the right choice.[/woodmart_text_block][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row content_placement="bottom" css=".vc_custom_1781008093388{margin-bottom: 30px woodmart_box_shadow="no" wd_hide_on_desktop="no" wd_hide_on_tablet="no" wd_hide_on_mobile="no" display_inline="no"][woodmart_text_block woodmart_css_id="6a28027e07fd9" woodmart_inline="no" title_decoration_box_shadow="eyJkZXZpY2VzIjp7ImRlc2t0b3AiOnsiaG9yaXpvbnRhbCI6IjAiLCJ2ZXJ0aWNhbCI6IjAiLCJibHVyIjoiMCIsInNwcmVhZCI6IjAiLCJjb2xvciI6IiJ9fX0=" css=".vc_custom_1781007141174{margin-bottom: 60px !important;}" responsive_spacing="eyJwYXJhbV90eXBlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfcmVzcG9uc2l2ZV9zcGFjaW5nIiwic2VsZWN0b3JfaWQiOiI2YTI4MDI3ZTA3ZmQ5Iiwic2hvcnRjb2RlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfdGV4dF9ibG9jayIsImRhdGEiOnsidGFibGV0Ijp7Im1hcmdpbi1ib3R0b20iOiI0MCJ9LCJtb2JpbGUiOnt9fX0=" parallax_scroll="no" wd_hide_on_desktop="no" wd_hide_on_tablet="no" wd_hide_on_mobile="no"]Once you have a handle on the Four Cs, the next question is style. Diamond necklaces span an enormous range of designs, and understanding the most popular silhouettes will help you match the piece to its intended purpose — and to the person who will wear it.

A solitaire pendant is the most enduringly popular choice. A single diamond — round brilliant, oval, or pear-shaped — suspended from a fine chain is effortlessly versatile. It works with a casual weekend outfit and a black-tie gown in equal measure, which makes it an ideal everyday piece and a safe choice when you are buying for someone else. A halo pendant adds a ring of smaller diamonds around a central stone, dramatically amplifying the perceived size and sparkle for its price. For those who want something truly lavish, a tennis necklace — a continuous line of identically matched diamonds encircling the neck — is the pinnacle of diamond jewellery. It is a piece that genuinely needs no other jewellery to complete a look.[/woodmart_text_block][woodmart_title title_width="custom" woodmart_css_id="6a2803801d5f4" title_desktop_width="eyJwYXJhbV90eXBlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfc2xpZGVyIiwiY3NzX2FyZ3MiOnsiLS13ZC1tYXgtd2lkdGgiOlsiIl19LCJjc3NfcGFyYW1zIjp7ImRldmljZSI6ImRlc2t0b3AifSwic2VsZWN0b3JfaWQiOiI2YTI4MDM4MDFkNWY0IiwiZGF0YSI6eyJkZXNrdG9wIjo1NzB9fQ==" title="Thank you for taking the time to read this post. item.title: How Ethical Sourcing is Changing the Jewellery Game
item.dc:creator: Mr. Mackay
item.content:encoded:
[vc_row][vc_column][woodmart_text_block woodmart_css_id="6a2801805b62b" woodmart_inline="no" title_decoration_box_shadow="eyJkZXZpY2VzIjp7ImRlc2t0b3AiOnsiaG9yaXpvbnRhbCI6IjAiLCJ2ZXJ0aWNhbCI6IjAiLCJibHVyIjoiMCIsInNwcmVhZCI6IjAiLCJjb2xvciI6IiJ9fX0=" responsive_spacing="eyJwYXJhbV90eXBlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfcmVzcG9uc2l2ZV9zcGFjaW5nIiwic2VsZWN0b3JfaWQiOiI2YTI4MDE4MDViNjJiIiwic2hvcnRjb2RlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfdGV4dF9ibG9jayIsImRhdGEiOnsidGFibGV0Ijp7Im1hcmdpbi1ib3R0b20iOiI0MCJ9LCJtb2JpbGUiOnt9fX0=" parallax_scroll="no" wd_hide_on_desktop="no" wd_hide_on_tablet="no" wd_hide_on_mobile="no" css=".vc_custom_1781006740038{margin-bottom: 60px !important;}"]Chain length is another detail worth getting right. A 16-inch chain sits at the collarbone and is ideal for pendants you want to wear close to the neckline. An 18-inch chain falls just below the collarbone — the most universally flattering length for everyday wear. A 20-inch chain rests at the top of the chest and works well for larger, bolder pendants. Tennis necklaces are most commonly worn at 16 or 17 inches for a snug, classic fit. If you are unsure, 18 inches is almost always the right choice.[/woodmart_text_block][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row content_placement="bottom" css=".vc_custom_1781008093388{margin-bottom: 30px 60px !important;}" responsive_spacing="eyJwYXJhbV90eXBlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfcmVzcG9uc2l2ZV9zcGFjaW5nIiwic2VsZWN0b3JfaWQiOiI2YTI4MDI3ZGNlODRjIiwic2hvcnRjb2RlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfdGV4dF9ibG9jayIsImRhdGEiOnsidGFibGV0Ijp7Im1hcmdpbi1ib3R0b20iOiI0MCJ9LCJtb2JpbGUiOnt9fX0=" parallax_scroll="no" wd_hide_on_desktop="no" wd_hide_on_tablet="no" wd_hide_on_mobile="no"]Diamonds have been treasured for thousands of years, but the way we understand and evaluate them today is the product of a remarkably precise science. Since the mid-twentieth century, gemologists have used a standardised framework — universally known as the Four Cs — to describe the quality of any diamond. Understanding these four properties will not turn you into an expert overnight, but it will give you the vocabulary and confidence to ask the right questions, compare stones fairly, and ultimately walk away with a piece you are proud to own.[/woodmart_text_block][woodmart_title align="left" woodmart_css_id="6a28021015ffe" title="Understanding the Four Cs" after_title="The Four Cs are Cut, Colour, Clarity, and Carat weight. Each plays a distinct role in determining how a diamond looks and how much it costs." after_font_size="eyJwYXJhbV90eXBlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfcmVzcG9uc2l2ZV9zaXplIiwiY3NzX2FyZ3MiOnsiZm9udC1zaXplIjpbIiAudGl0bGUtYWZ0ZXJfdGl0bGUiXX0sInNlbGVjdG9yX2lkIjoiNmEyODAyMTAxNWZmZSIsImRhdGEiOnsiZGVza3RvcCI6IjE2cHgifX0=" css=".vc_custom_1781007015855{margin-bottom: 20px !important;}" responsive_spacing="eyJwYXJhbV90eXBlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfcmVzcG9uc2l2ZV9zcGFjaW5nIiwic2VsZWN0b3JfaWQiOiI2YTI4MDIxMDE1ZmZlIiwic2hvcnRjb2RlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfdGl0bGUiLCJkYXRhIjp7InRhYmxldCI6e30sIm1vYmlsZSI6e319fQ==" wd_hide_on_desktop="no" wd_hide_on_tablet="no" wd_hide_on_mobile="no"][woodmart_list size="medium" list_type="unordered-2" woodmart_css_id="6a2802b1e518e" list="%5B%7B%22list-content%22%3A%22Often%20considered%20the%20most%20important%20of%20the%20four%2C%20cut%20refers%20not%20to%20the%20shape%20of%20the%20diamond%20but%20to%20how%20well%20its%20facets%20interact%20with%20light.%20A%20well-cut%20stone%20will%20appear%20brilliantly%20alive%3B%20a%20poorly%20cut%20one%20will%20look%20dull%20regardless%20of%20its%20other%20qualities.%20Cut%20grades%20typically%20run%20from%20Excellent%20down%20to%20Poor.%22%2C%22item_type%22%3A%22inherit%22%7D%2C%7B%22list-content%22%3A%22Diamond%20colour%20is%20graded%20on%20a%20scale%20from%20D%20(completely%20colourless)%20to%20Z%20(noticeably%20yellow%20or%20brown).%20For%20most%20necklace%20settings%20in%20white%20gold%20or%20platinum%2C%20diamonds%20in%20the%20D%E2%80%93G%20range%20appear%20beautifully%20white%20to%20the%20naked%20eye.%20In%20yellow%20gold%20settings%2C%20slightly%20warmer%20stones%20in%20the%20H%E2%80%93J%20range%20can%20look%20equally%20stunning%20at%20a%20more%20accessible%20price%20point.%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%22%2C%22item_type%22%3A%22inherit%22%7D%2C%7B%22list-content%22%3A%22Clarity%20measures%20the%20presence%20of%20internal%20inclusions%20or%20external%20blemishes.%20The%20scale%20runs%20from%20Flawless%20(FL)%20to%20Included%20(I3).%20For%20a%20pendant%20worn%20at%20the%20chest%2C%20a%20stone%20graded%20VS2%20or%20SI1%20will%20almost%20certainly%20appear%20eye-clean%20%E2%80%94%20meaning%20no%20imperfections%20are%20visible%20without%20magnification%20%E2%80%94%20making%20it%20an%20excellent%20value%20choice.%22%2C%22item_type%22%3A%22inherit%22%7D%2C%7B%22list-content%22%3A%22Carat%20is%20simply%20a%20measure%20of%20weight%20(one%20carat%20equals%200.2%20grams).%20Larger%20stones%20are%20rarer%20and%20therefore%20more%20expensive%20per%20carat%2C%20but%20carat%20weight%20alone%20does%20not%20determine%20beauty.%20A%20smaller%2C%20well-cut%20diamond%20will%20consistently%20outshine%20a%20larger%2C%20poorly%20cut%20one.%22%2C%22item_type%22%3A%22inherit%22%7D%5D" css=".vc_custom_1781007093571{margin-bottom: 60px !important;}" 60px !important;}" parallax_scroll="no" wd_hide_on_desktop="no" wd_hide_on_tablet="no" wd_hide_on_mobile="no"]Once you have a handle on the Four Cs, the next question is style. Diamond necklaces span an enormous range of designs, and understanding the most popular silhouettes will help you match the piece to its intended purpose — and to the person who will wear it.

A solitaire pendant is the most enduringly popular choice. A single diamond — round brilliant, oval, or pear-shaped — suspended from a fine chain is effortlessly versatile. It works with a casual weekend outfit and a black-tie gown in equal measure, which makes it an ideal everyday piece and a safe choice when you are buying for someone else. A halo pendant adds a ring of smaller diamonds around a central stone, dramatically amplifying the perceived size and sparkle for its price. For those who want something truly lavish, a tennis necklace — a continuous line of identically matched diamonds encircling the neck — is the pinnacle of diamond jewellery. item.title: Gift packaging available

item.content:encoded:

Please allow one additional business day for processing of Engraving orders.
Free standard shipping on select Lab-grown Diamonds. Express orders arrive in 1-2 business days.[/woodmart_text_block][woodmart_accordion state="all_closed" title_font_family="text" title_font_weight="400" opener_alignment="right" woodmart_css_id="6a01e0b47393c" hide_top_bottom_border="no" responsive_spacing="eyJwYXJhbV90eXBlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfcmVzcG9uc2l2ZV9zcGFjaW5nIiwic2VsZWN0b3JfaWQiOiI2YTAxZTBiNDczOTNjIiwic2hvcnRjb2RlIjoid29vZG1hcnRfYWNjb3JkaW9uIiwiZGF0YSI6eyJ0YWJsZXQiOnt9LCJtb2JpbGUiOnt9fX0=" wd_hide_on_desktop="no" wd_hide_on_tablet="no" wd_hide_on_mobile="no" faq_schema="no"][woodmart_accordion_item title="What are your shipping options and delivery times?"]Orders ship Monday to Friday excluding US Federal holidays.[/woodmart_accordion_item][woodmart_accordion_item title="How do I track my order?"]Once your order has shipped from our warehouse, you will receive an email notification with a tracking information. Please also check your junk email. This email will have all your shipping information and ways to track your order.[/woodmart_accordion_item][woodmart_accordion_item title="What if I received an incorrect item or an item is missing from my order?"]We apologize for any inconvenience if you are missing items from your order or received the incorrect item. If this should happen please contact our Customer Care team immediately so we can resolve the issue.[/woodmart_accordion_item][woodmart_accordion_item title="Will ship products to locations outside of the U.S.?"]US Online ships within the United States (including Alaska, Hawaii, and Puerto Rico). Unfortunately, we do not deliver to American Samoa, U.S. Virgin Islands, Guam, Micronesia, Marshall Islands, Northern Mariana Islands, or Palau.[/woodmart_accordion_item][/woodmart_accordion][/vc_column][/vc_row]
